user_complaints: Why you should never use Groww - A Review
strategic_moves: Fisdom (Finwizard Technology Private Limited) has completed its strategic acquisition by Groww (Billionbrains Garage Ventures Limited)
Groww has completed its acquisition of Bengaluru-based wealth technology startup Fisdom after securing approval from the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI)
The move marks a strategic step for Groww as it looks to broaden its presence in the wealth management sector and reduce reliance on market-linked trading revenues ahead of its planned public listing
The move strengthens Groww's push to build a wealth management super app, broadening its investment and advisory ecosystem
new_features: This article delves into the most recent updates and features introduced on the Groww app, examining how they impact Indian investors and how they can be used to optimize investment strategies
Discover new features, changes to existing services, and how these improvements can enhance your investment journey in the Indian stock market, mutual funds, and more
